tasks.title: LLM Router — Core Architecture
tasks.details: Design and implement a dynamic LLM routing layer with RoutingContext, LLMBackend enum, pure routing function, and strategy trait.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests covering all branches and integration points.

subtasks.title: Define RoutingContext struct and LLMBackend enum
subtasks.details: Create the Rust structs and enums with serde support and documentation.

subtasks.title: Implement pure routing function
subtasks.details: Write the core deterministic selection logic with strategy trait.

subtasks.title: Add config-driven thresholds and time windows
subtasks.details: Implement TOML/JSON config loading with hot-reload support.

subtasks.title: Integrate router into CPU pipeline
subtasks.details: Wire the pre-LLM decision layer and pass context correctly.

subtasks.title: Implement logging and telemetry
subtasks.details: Add structured logging and metrics emission for every decision.

subtasks.title: Build fallback and error handling logic
subtasks.details: Create resilient fallback chain with user override precedence.

subtasks.title: Ensure compatibility with tools/skills/hooks
subtasks.details: Verify hooks can observe and modify routing outcomes.

subtasks.title: Write unit, integration, and load tests
subtasks.details: Deliver full test suite including simulated load scenarios.

tasks.title: LLM Router — Complexity Scoring Engine
tasks.details: Design and implement the complexity scoring subsystem that feeds the LLM Router with a normalized 0.0–1.0 score used to decide backend selection.
tasks.testStrategy: Comprehensive unit tests for each heuristic module.

subtasks.title: Define ComplexityFeatures struct and feature extractors
subtasks.details: Implement token, code, keyword, math, and structure detectors.

subtasks.title: Build modular scoring pipeline trait and registry
subtasks.details: Create Heuristic trait and dynamic registration mechanism.

subtasks.title: Implement core heuristic modules
subtasks.details: TokenCount, CodeDensity, ReasoningKeywords, MathSymbols, MultiStep, StructuralDepth.

subtasks.title: Add config-driven weights and normalization
subtasks.details: Load weights from TOML, clamp and normalize final score to [0,1].

subtasks.title: Integrate with CPU prompt preprocessor
subtasks.details: Wire scoring call into the existing preprocessing stage.

subtasks.title: Implement structured logging and telemetry
subtasks.details: Emit per-heuristic breakdown and final score on every invocation.

subtasks.title: Optimize for <1 ms P99 latency
subtasks.details: Remove allocations, add fast-path, and run micro-benchmarks.

subtasks.title: Write unit, property, golden-file, and benchmark tests
subtasks.details: Deliver full test suite and latency validation.

tasks.title: LLM Router — Time-of-Day & Schedule Logic
tasks.details: Design and implement the time-aware routing subsystem.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for the schedule evaluator.

subtasks.title: Define ScheduleWindow, RoutingProfile, and ScheduleConfig structs
subtasks.details: Create serializable types with 12 h/24 h parsing helpers.

subtasks.title: Implement deterministic schedule evaluator
subtasks.details: Pure function that returns the active profile for any timestamp.

subtasks.title: Add config hot-reload for schedules
subtasks.details: Watch file or explicit reload API with zero-downtime swap.

subtasks.title: Implement user override mechanism
subtasks.details: Temporary suspend and force-profile commands with TTL.

subtasks.title: Wire timestamp injection into CPU pipeline
subtasks.details: Ensure RoutingContext always carries current wall time.

subtasks.title: Add structured logging and telemetry
subtasks.details: Emit profile, window, latency, and override on every evaluation.

subtasks.title: Optimize evaluator for <1 ms P99
subtasks.details: Pre-compute windows, avoid allocations, add fast path.

subtasks.title: Write unit, property, golden-file, and benchmark tests
subtasks.details: Full test suite plus latency validation.

tasks.title: LLM Router — System Load & Telemetry Integration
tasks.details: Design and implement the system-load awareness subsystem.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for the telemetry snapshot struct and ring-buffer accessors.

subtasks.title: Define TelemetrySnapshot struct and metric fields
subtasks.details: GPU, VRAM, CPU, temp, per-endpoint RTT, timestamp.

subtasks.title: Implement non-blocking collector (thread / async task)
subtasks.details: Background sampling with lock-free publication.

subtasks.title: Add LAN latency measurement to Ollama nodes
subtasks.details: Periodic ping/RTT with rolling average.

subtasks.title: Expose stable read-only API for router
subtasks.details: `get_latest_telemetry()` used by RoutingContext.

subtasks.title: Add config-driven load thresholds and hot-reload
subtasks.details: TOML/JSON thresholds with zero-downtime update.

subtasks.title: Integrate snapshot into RoutingContext
subtasks.details: Wire telemetry into the pre-LLM decision layer.

subtasks.title: Implement structured logging of used metrics
subtasks.details: Record every value that affected a routing choice.

subtasks.title: Write unit, integration, golden-file, and stress tests
subtasks.details: Full coverage plus simulated load scenarios.

tasks.title: LLM Router — Backend Health Checking & Availability Layer
tasks.details: Design and implement the health-checking subsystem.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for HealthStatus construction, transition logic, and config parsing.

subtasks.title: Define HealthStatus struct and probe result fields
subtasks.details: reachable, latency_ms, last_success, error_rate, degraded, capability flags.

subtasks.title: Implement async health probes for local, LAN, Gemini, Grok
subtasks.details: Non-blocking probes with unified result type.

subtasks.title: Build health snapshot store with lock-free reads
subtasks.details: Background updater publishing latest HealthStatus.

subtasks.title: Expose stable read-only health query API
subtasks.details: `get_backend_health()` used by RoutingContext.

subtasks.title: Add config-driven degradation thresholds and hot-reload
subtasks.details: TOML/JSON thresholds with zero-downtime swap.

subtasks.title: Integrate health snapshots into RoutingContext
subtasks.details: Wire health data into the pre-LLM decision layer.

subtasks.title: Implement structured logging of all health transitions
subtasks.details: Record every state change with reason and timestamp.

subtasks.title: Write unit, integration, golden-file, and stress tests
subtasks.details: Full coverage plus simulated failure scenarios.

tasks.title: LLM Router — Configuration System & Hot-Reloading
tasks.details: Design and implement the configuration subsystem.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for TOML/JSON parsing, validation rules, and struct construction.

subtasks.title: Define RouterConfig struct and all nested fields
subtasks.details: Complexity weights, windows, thresholds, profiles, intervals.

subtasks.title: Implement TOML and JSON parsers with validation
subtasks.details: Serde + custom validators and detailed error reporting.

subtasks.title: Build atomic hot-reload mechanism with file watcher
subtasks.details: Notify-based watcher, double-buffer swap, zero-downtime.

subtasks.title: Create stable read-only config query API
subtasks.details: Thread-safe snapshot access for all subsystems.

subtasks.title: Wire config into CPU pipeline and RoutingContext
subtasks.details: Inject latest config snapshot on every prompt.

subtasks.title: Add structured logging for loads, reloads, and failures
subtasks.details: Log every event with path, timestamp, and diff.

subtasks.title: Write unit, hot-reload, validation, and golden-file tests
subtasks.details: Full test suite ensuring atomicity and correctness.

tasks.title: LLM Router — User Override & Session Preference System
tasks.details: Design and implement the user override subsystem.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for the override resolution engine.

subtasks.title: Define OverrideTier enum and UserOverride struct
subtasks.details: one-shot, session, persistent with timestamps and TTL.

subtasks.title: Implement override resolution engine with strict priority order
subtasks.details: Pure function returning the effective override or none.

subtasks.title: Add validation against health and capability flags
subtasks.details: Reject or downgrade overrides targeting unhealthy backends.

subtasks.title: Integrate overrides into RoutingContext
subtasks.details: Wire user preference data into the pre-LLM decision layer.

subtasks.title: Implement commands/hooks for setting and clearing overrides
subtasks.details: /use, /prefer, /clear-override with proper scoping.

subtasks.title: Add structured logging for all override events
subtasks.details: Log activation, deactivation, and conflict with full context.

subtasks.title: Write unit, integration, and golden-file tests
subtasks.details: Comprehensive coverage of resolution order and edge cases.

tasks.title: LLM Router — Fallback Engine & Degradation Logic
tasks.details: Design and implement the fallback subsystem.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for the fallback chain evaluator.

subtasks.title: Define BackendSelection struct and fallback chain evaluator
subtasks.details: Capture chosen backend, attempted fallbacks, reasons, health, timestamps.

subtasks.title: Implement deterministic fallback chain logic
subtasks.details: Pure function that returns the next viable backend.

subtasks.title: Integrate health, load, and override data into fallback decisions
subtasks.details: Respect health status and override precedence.

subtasks.title: Add graceful degradation modes
subtasks.details: Reduced capability mode when only lower-tier backends remain.

subtasks.title: Support config-driven fallback ordering and hot-reload
subtasks.details: TOML/JSON fallback rules with zero-downtime update.

subtasks.title: Implement structured logging of fallback events
subtasks.details: Log every attempt, failure, and recovery.

subtasks.title: Write unit and integration tests for fallback scenarios
subtasks.details: Full coverage of failure and degradation cases.

tasks.title: LLM Router — Integration & Testing
tasks.details: Wire all router subsystems together and deliver a complete integration layer.
tasks.testStrategy: End-to-end integration tests covering normal routing, fallback, overrides, health degradation, and schedule windows.

subtasks.title: Create integration entry point
subtasks.details: Implement decide_backend_with_full_context combining all modules.

subtasks.title: Build test helpers and mock stores
subtasks.details: MockTelemetryStore, MockHealthStore, fixture loaders.

subtasks.title: Write integration test suite
subtasks.details: Cover all routing paths and edge cases.

subtasks.title: Add golden-file regression tests
subtasks.details: Store known prompt → decision outcomes.

tasks.title: LLM Router — Documentation & Examples
tasks.details: Produce comprehensive usage documentation, configuration examples, and code samples.
tasks.testStrategy: Documentation review and example compilation tests.

subtasks.title: Write usage guide and README section
subtasks.details: Cover basic and advanced usage patterns.

subtasks.title: Provide TOML/JSON configuration examples
subtasks.details: Minimal, production, and multi-profile configs.

subtasks.title: Add code examples for common integrations
subtasks.details: Pipeline wiring, override commands, telemetry consumption.

tasks.title: LLM Router — Performance Optimization
tasks.details: Add fast-path scoring for short prompts and zero-allocation hot paths.
tasks.testStrategy: Micro-benchmarks and latency regression tests.

subtasks.title: Implement fast-path complexity check
subtasks.details: is_simple_prompt and fast_score functions.

subtasks.title: Add latency measurement helper
subtasks.details: measure_route_latency for benchmarks.

subtasks.title: Run and record micro-benchmarks
subtasks.details: Validate P99 latency targets.

tasks.title: LLM Router — Security & Validation
tasks.details: Add capability validation and input sanitization.
tasks.testStrategy: Security-focused unit tests and capability matrix tests.

subtasks.title: Define Capability enum and validation logic
subtasks.details: validate_capabilities against backend registry.

subtasks.title: Implement backend name sanitization
subtasks.details: sanitize_backend_name prevents invalid or malicious input.

subtasks.title: Write security and capability tests
subtasks.details: Cover rejection of unsupported capabilities.

tasks.title: LLM Router — Monitoring & Observability
tasks.details: Emit structured routing decision events and maintain RouterMetrics.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify structured logs and metrics emission in integration tests.

subtasks.title: Implement structured logging helper
subtasks.details: log_routing_decision with timestamp and context.

subtasks.title: Create RouterMetrics struct and recording API
subtasks.details: Track decisions, latency, and averages.

subtasks.title: Wire metrics into integration layer
subtasks.details: Record every routing decision.

tasks.title: LLM Router — Deployment & Configuration Guide
tasks.details: Produce a production deployment guide covering systemd service setup and operational runbooks.
tasks.testStrategy: End-to-end deployment smoke test and documentation review.

subtasks.title: Write production configuration recommendations
subtasks.details: Hot-reload, load thresholds, health settings.

subtasks.title: Provide systemd service example
subtasks.details: Service file with restart policy and user/group.

subtasks.title: Document health and metrics integration points
subtasks.details: How to wire RouterMetrics and HealthStore into monitoring.
